awards_subtitle: Awards will be given to the TOP outstanding individuals.
kudos_description: A recognition and appreciation activity for colleagues - introduced for the first time for all Sunners. The activity will be launched in November 2025, encouraging Sun* members to share recognition and appreciation for colleagues on the system announced by the organizing committee.
awards_kudos_promo_description: A recognition and appreciation activity for colleagues - introduced for the first time for all Sunners. The activity will be launched in July 2025, encouraging Sun* members to share recognition and appreciation for colleagues on the system announced by the organizing committee.
